response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Engineer with strong distributed systems and polyglot programming skills, but he lacks the executive leadership, team scaling, and deep production multi-agent AI experience required for this CTO role. His background does not demonstrate the strategic oversight, team-building capability (scaling 10 to 30+), or specialized fintech infrastructure expertise needed to lead a venture-backed AI-native scale-up.
strengths: Extensive polyglot engineering experience across backend, distributed systems, and microservices.
Demonstrated architectural initiative by founding and maintaining an open-source, event-driven geo-data platform.
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP) at re:cinq.
concerns: Lacks executive leadership experience and a track record of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people.
Missing deep architectural experience with production-grade, multi-agent AI systems in regulated financial environments.
No evidence of managing outsourced engineering partners, developing a technical leadership layer, or communicating at the board level.
